title: Create: Recipes Plus
description: Adds a few new recipes for the create mod
body:
This adds 10 new recipes to the create mod: tuff, cobbled deepslate, cobblestone in a mixer, dripstone, haunting andesite to netherrack, Lapis, diamonds, leather, ink sacs, and calcite

Adds item empty ink sac, obtained by haunting leather



Create Mod is required for both versions

Create: Dragons Plus is required for 1.21.1 Neoforge

Create: Enchantment Industry is required for 1.20.1 Forge and Fabric 

[Curseforge Page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-recipes-plus)
